text:
Top 14 Competency Assessment Tools in 2026

This comprehensive article reviews leading competency assessment platforms designed to evaluate candidate skills and organizational talent.

WeCP (We Create Problems) leads the list as a popular platform offering skill evaluations, AI-powered assessment creation, code editors, and real-time proctoring. The article notes that 'companies using skill assessments during hiring have seen a 30% increase in new hire performance.'

Other featured tools include: HackerEarth - Technical hiring with coding challenges; HireVue - Video interviewing and soft skills assessment; Harver - Customizable role-specific tests; Codility - Programming assessment with collaborative features; TestGorilla - Pre-built test library with adaptive testing; iMocha - Domain-specific and coding assessments; Toggl Hire - Multi-level screening automation; Mettl - Simulation-based assessments; HackerRank - Technical talent evaluation; Hogan Assessments - Leadership and personality evaluations; TalentGuard - Competency management solutions; SHL - Research-based competency frameworks; eSkill - Customizable assessments with flexible formats.

The article emphasizes that assessment tools reduce hiring bias, improve employee retention, identify skill gaps, and streamline recruitment processes while supporting compliance with Equal Employment Opportunity guidelines.
